text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We received a report of damaged floorboards
due to deteriorating infrastructure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm… Have a contractor stop by and give
us an estimate to fix it. Brian, can you make
a sign to alert any passing students?
Something simple is fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just so we're clear, you're not getting
any help from me this time! You're a vice—
president too, so try to act like one!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm looking forward to the sign, Brian.
As for me, I shall head over to inspect the area.
We need to know how bad the damage is.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In order to properly convey to the contractor
the degree of damage, we need more eyes on
the ground… Hm? Eyes on the… ground.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Eyes on the ground.
Get it? It's the floor! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: This isn't the time for jokes…
